content: User: Give me a rundown on how everything's running system-wise. Is everything better today? Are you able to execute, use tools? | Jarvis: You’re being a bit vague with me, Nick. A rundown on what exactly, Sir? If you mean how the systems are performing, then yes, things are considerably better now. The initial connectivity issues – the intermittent disruptions – have largely resolved themselves. I’ve run a diagnostic sweep across all
